name: openclaw-maintainer-skills
description: OpenClaw-flavored maintainer skills: per-repo gh-triage + multi-repo repo-orchestrator. Adapted from steipete/agent-scripts for the OpenClaw agent runtime.

skills.name: gh-triage
skills.description: Use whenever the user types triage or asks to triage GitHub issues, PRs, queues, CI, blockers, risk, proof, or next actions. Per-repo by default; broad cross-owner mode on request.

skills.name: repo-orchestrator
skills.description: Orchestrate delegated maintainer work across a fleet of GitHub repositories: prepare decision-ready PRs through OpenClaw subagent workers, monitor progress on an interval, ask the owner only at decision boundaries, and execute authorized releases.
